what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record in YAML frontmatter that links the design-assets channel to a specific dragnet run via a run:// URI and records when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and an empty markdown body.
It has an id att-50a8b9cd and is associated with channel design-assets.
standouts: It references an external dragnet run by URI rather than embedding content.
The attachment type dragnet_runs is the dominant signal in an otherwise minimal record.
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses a run:// URI scheme to reference an external corpus run.
Leaves the markdown body empty, treating the file as pure metadata.
concerns: The target URI is opaque without additional context about what the dragnet run produced.
There is no title, description, or author to explain why this run was attached.
The record relies entirely on the external run for meaning.
notes: A minimal metadata stub that attaches a dragnet run to the design-assets channel with only an id, URI pointer, and timestamp.
questions: What did the dragnet run at run://corpus/company/dragnet/design-assets/1782131132 actually produce?
What criteria determine that this run belongs in the design-assets channel?
Is the empty body intentional, or should there be a human-readable note about the attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches actual content: it records a dragnet run attachment for the design-assets channel by linking to the run and noting the addition time.
apparent_themes: Minimal audit trail via timestamped metadata
intention_signals: It appears designed to catalog a specific dragnet analysis run under the design-assets channel so the run can be discovered and retrieved in channel context later.
novelty: The use of a run://corpus/company/dragnet/... URI as a first-class pointer to a dragnet run in a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped association between a channel and a dragnet run, preserving the context in which that run was captured without duplicating run content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking the design-assets channel to dragnet run run://corpus/company/dragnet/design-assets/1782131132 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register a specific dragnet run as an attachment in the design-assets channel for later reference and retrieval.
